strategic_objective: Clarify stability and class-dependence of strong feature correlations and assess redundancy impact on model simplification potential.
key_checks: Compare dependency strength across BENIGN and DDoS classes
Identify feature pairs with near-perfect correlation within each class
Evaluate if redundancy patterns persist under different attack phases or time windows
Assess if removing redundant features affects class-separability signals
success_criteria: Evidence of stable or varying dependency profiles by class
Identification of redundant features that can be removed without loss of key signal
Characterization of dependency patterns that may simplify feature space without weakening detection
router_constraints: preserve evidence refs e13 to e22
